Name: departments_by_pk
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "public"."departments"."id" = $1::uuid AND "public"."departments"."id" = ANY($2::uuid[]) LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."name" AS "name", "_root.r.files"."files" AS "files") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root.r.files"), '[]') AS "files" FROM (WITH "_root.r.files.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."department_files" WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "storage"."files" f WHERE "public"."department_files"."file_id" = f."id" AND f."bucket_id" = $3::text AND (f."uploaded_by_user_id" = $4::uuid OR f."bucket_id" = $5::text)) AND "department_id" = "_root.base"."id" AND ("public"."department_files"."department_id" = ANY($6::uuid[]) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "storage"."files" g WHERE "public"."department_files"."file_id" = g."id" AND g."uploaded_by_user_id" = $7::uuid))) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.files.r.file"."file" AS "file", "_root.r.files.r.department"."department" AS "department") AS "_e")) AS "_root.r.files" FROM "_root.r.files.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.files.r.file.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "storage"."files" WHERE "_root.r.files.base"."file_id" = "id" AND ("storage"."files"."uploaded_by_user_id" = $8::uuid OR "storage"."files"."bucket_id" = $9::text) LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.files.r.file.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "file" FROM "_root.r.files.r.file.base") AS "_root.r.files.r.file" ON ('true') LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.files.r.department.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "_root.r.files.base"."department_id" = "id" AND "public"."departments"."id" = ANY($10::uuid[]) LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.files.r.department.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "department" FROM "_root.r.files.r.department.base") AS "_root.r.files.r.department" ON ('true')) AS "_root.r.files") AS "_root.r.files" ON ('true')
